title: Add GraphQL API for product catalog
description: Exposes the product catalog through a GraphQL endpoint with nested resolvers for categories and reviews.
diff:
diff --git a/api/graphql/schema.py b/api/graphql/schema.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f2a3b4c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/api/graphql/schema.py
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+import strawberry
+from typing import Optional
+
+@strawberry.type
+class Review:
+    id: int
+    text: str
+    author: 'User'
+
+@strawberry.type
+class Product:
+    id: int
+    name: str
+    reviews: list[Review]  # Nested, no depth limit
+    related_products: list['Product']  # Self-referential, unbounded
+
+@strawberry.type
+class Query:
+    @strawberry.field
+    def products(self) -> list[Product]:
+        return get_all_products()
comments: security-jane: No query depth limiting! The self-referential related_products field allows queries like { products { related_products { related_products { ... } } } } to arbitrary depth. An attacker can craft deeply nested queries to DoS the server.
karl: Also no query complexity analysis or rate limiting on the GraphQL endpoint. Need graphql-depth-limit middleware.
author-lily: I'll add depth limiting and complexity analysis.
author: lily
